title: Intense Velvety Russian Natto Pilaf
description: A weeknight Russian dish featuring natto, with a herbal and velvety texture, made with flambe technique, and is onion and garlic free.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the carrots and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the thyme and parsley, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the natto and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the rice and stir to combine with the natto and vegetables.
Add the vegetable broth, bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the skillet.
Simmer for 20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Remove the skillet from the heat and add the vodka.
Ignite the vodka with a match or lighter, and let it flambe for 30 seconds.
Serve the pilaf hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
